codeReview.summary: The feature adds the required UI surfaces (Generate Variants + BulkPublishPanel), but BulkPublishPanel determines publish success from stale React state after async operations, which can prevent post status updates after successful bulk publishing.

issues.description: After `await Promise.allSettled(...)`, success is computed from `platformStates` in the current closure (`const results = Object.entries(platformStates)`). Because state updates from `publishToPlatform` are async, this often reads pre-publish state and skips `onPublishSuccess` even when one or more platforms published successfully.

`handleRetry` checks `platformStates[platform]` immediately after awaiting `publishToPlatform(platform)`, again reading stale state and potentially skipping `onPublishSuccess` after a successful retry.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill assumes UI verification is always runnable, but this worker hit an auth-blocked environment and could not complete in-app verification of the new drawer flows.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session 26090b2f-f3bb-4511-bb22-d0f7f0791f1f shows agent-browser redirected to /login; handoff.skillFeedback suggests documenting this blocker; .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md step 5 currently assumes direct UI access.

summary: Fail: bulk publish success handling is unreliable due to stale state reads, so the parent callback that marks posts as posted may not run even when publishing succeeds.
